Federated learning dashboard ready

Click "Start Training" to begin

Train Settings

Parameter Value Description
num_clients - Number of clients in federated learning
num_rounds - Number of training rounds
server_address - Server IP address and port
use_he - Use Homomorphic Encryption
use_defense - Enable defense mechanisms
use_history_updates - Use historical updates for training
enable_poisoning - Enable poisoning attacks
use_random_disconnection - Enable client disconnection
disconnect_prob - Probability of client disconnection
max_stale_rounds - Maximum rounds before update is considered stale
defense_sigma - Sigma value for defense mechanism
trust_ema_alpha - EMA alpha for trust scores
he_encrypt_ratio - Ratio for homomorphic encryption
he_mask_seed - Seed for HE mask generation

Rounds Accuracy Total Time
